name: Banana Passover Sponge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat yolks with sugar until creamy.
2. Add the mashed bananas, beat well.
3. Whip egg whites until stiff in a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add cake meal, potato starch, and salt to yolk mixture.
5. Gently fold in egg whites into the yolk mixture.
6. Gently fold in vanilla flavoring.
7. Bake at 325°F for about an hour – more or less depending on your oven.
8. Use an angle food cake pan.
9. Cool upside down for about 30 minutes, or until cooled completely.
10. Cut in half with a knife.
11. Ice with real whipped cream or cool whip.
12. Top with bananas and a few walnuts.
